tagline: Pool service you can rely on from local people you can trust

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves the Elite
Treatment
hero.subheadline: For over 20 years, our family-owned team has kept Tulsa-area pools crystal clear and worry-free. From weekly maintenance to custom builds, we handle every detail so you can skip the stress and enjoy the swim.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: Whether it is routine maintenance, a stubborn algae problem, or a full custom build, Elite Pool Service has the expertise and equipment to handle it all under one roof.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming, and equipment checks every week. Your pool stays swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Upgrades
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, and automation — diagnosed and repaired by Hayward-authorized technicians. Energy-efficient upgrades available.

cards.title: Algae Removal & Recovery
cards.description: Green pool? We eliminate algae fast with professional-grade treatments and restore water clarity, safety, and proper chemistry.

cards.title: Pool Leak Detection
cards.description: Advanced leak detection methods pinpoint problems in your pool structure, plumbing, or equipment — saving you water and money.

cards.title: Resurfacing & Remodeling
cards.description: Plaster repair, new coping, tile work, rock detailing, and finish upgrades that transform an aging pool into a backyard showpiece.

cards.title: Custom Gunite Pool Construction
cards.description: From design to first splash — custom gunite pools with water features, lighting, decking, and full automation built to your vision.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Evaluation
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We will visit your pool, assess its condition, and provide an honest quote — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our experienced, Hayward-certified technicians arrive on schedule and handle cleaning, chemistry, repairs, and inspections — every detail covered.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling, safe, and swim-ready all season. If anything is not right, we come back and fix it — that is the Elite promise.

about.label: Why Tulsa Trusts Elite Pool Service
about.headline: Family-Owned, Community-Proven, Built on 20 Years of Trust
about.description: Elite Pool Service is a family-owned Oklahoma business that has been serving the greater Tulsa area since 2004. With more than two decades of hands-on experience, we have earned an A+ BBB rating, recognition from Expertise.com and Yelp, and the loyalty of hundreds of local families. As an authorized Hayward warranty center, we back every job with manufacturer-level expertise and genuine parts.

features.title: Licensed & Fully Insured
features.description: Licensed contractor in Broken Arrow (CON-009998) with full liability coverage. Your property and investment are always protected.

features.title: Full-Service, One Company
features.description: From weekly cleanings to custom pool construction, you will not need to juggle multiple contractors. We handle every aspect of pool care.

features.title: Award-Winning Reputation
features.description: Named one of the 7 Best Pool Services in Tulsa by Expertise.com and a Yelp Top Ten pick. Our track record speaks for itself.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different, so we quote after inspecting yours. No hidden fees, no upsells — just fair pricing for quality work.

guarantee.headline: Our "Elite Service" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we will return to make it right at no additional cost. We have built our reputation over 20 years by standing behind every job — and we are not about to stop now.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. For urgent issues like algae blooms or equipment failures, we offer priority scheduling. Call us at 918-893-3893 and we will get you taken care of fast.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve around Tulsa?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire Tulsa metro area including Broken Arrow, Bixby, Jenks, Owasso, Sand Springs, Sapulpa, and throughout Northeast Oklahoma. If you are unsure whether you are in our service area, just give us a call.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We are a licensed contractor in Broken Arrow (CON-009998), carry full liability insurance, and are an authorized Hayward warranty center. We are also BBB A+ accredited since 2016.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. After each visit, you will know exactly what was done and the condition of your pool.

faqs.question: Can you help with pool remodeling or building a new pool?
faqs.answer: Yes — we are a full-service pool company. Beyond maintenance and repairs, we handle complete pool remodeling (resurfacing, coping, tile, rock work) and custom gunite pool construction from design through completion.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: I loved the professionalism and knowledge that the technician demonstrated. The employee performed a wonderful job cleaning the pool and maintaining the equipment; and the office staff I spoke with was both wonderful and patient. I highly recommend this service!

testimonials.name: First-Time Owner
testimonials.text: After several attempts with other companies we FINALLY found Elite Pool Service. As first-time pool owners, they explained the basics and helped us understand pool maintenance. They have treated us with respect and patience answering all our questions for over a year.

testimonials.name: Long-Time Client
testimonials.text: The gentlemen from Elite Pools are not only professional but as knowledgeable as anyone I have ever met. They give sound advice and go beyond the actual call of service to ensure the pool is right and ready to go.

contact.headline:
Ready for Pool Care
You Can Count On?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation pool evaluation from a family-owned team with 20+ years serving Tulsa. Honest pricing, reliable service, real results.

footer.description: Family-owned pool service. Proudly serving the Tulsa area for 20+ years.
